mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,SR_SEQ AS srSeq ,RQST_RSPS_TYPE_CD AS rqstRspsTypeCd ,RQST_RSPS_SEQ AS rqstRspsSeq ,SYS_CD AS sysCd ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SR_SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{srSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND RQST_RSPS_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{rqstRspsTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND RQST_RSPS_SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{rqstRspsSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by INTRFC_ID, SR_TYPE_CD, SR_SEQ ) p , (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SR_SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{srSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND RQST_RSPS_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{rqstRspsTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND RQST_RSPS_SEQ like CONCAT('%',#{rqstRspsSeq, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,SR_SEQ AS srSeq ,RQST_RSPS_TYPE_CD AS rqstRspsTypeCd ,RQST_RSPS_SEQ AS rqstRspsSeq ,SYS_CD AS sysCd ,MSG_LAYOUT_ID AS msgLayoutId FROM TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by SR_SEQ, RQST_RSPS_SEQ asc
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
